title: Can't see the pods running on my podman machine with kubetcl
body:
### Issue Description

Can't see the pods running on my podman machine but if a create a new machine and a recreate the kind cluster i can see them but if i stop the restart the machine i will not be able to see them


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.podman machine start
2.kubectl get pods --all-namespaces
3.


### Describe the results you received

Unable to connect to the server: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:58375: connectex: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it.

### Describe the results you expected
